inputs.label: Squat 1RM
inputs.businessContext: The lifter's one-rep max for the squat exercise in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lifter's one-rep max for the squat exercise in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sporcunun squat egzersizinde bir tekrar maksimumu (kilogram cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Das One-Rep-Max des Hebers für die Kniebeuge in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Répétition maximale du haltérophile pour l'exercice de squat en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: El máximo de una repetición del levantador para el ejercicio de sentadilla en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Bench Press 1RM
inputs.businessContext: The lifter's one-rep max for the bench press exercise in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lifter's one-rep max for the bench press exercise in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lifter'ın bench press egzersizi için tek tekrar maksimumu (kg cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Das One-Rep-Max des Hebers für das Bankdrücken in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le maximum d'une répétition du développé couché en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: El máximo de una repetición del levantador para el ejercicio de press de banca en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Deadlift 1RM
inputs.businessContext: The lifter's one-rep max for the deadlift exercise in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lifter's one-rep max for the deadlift exercise in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lifter'ın deadlift egzersizi için tek tekrar maksimumu (kg cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Das One-Rep-Max des Hebers für das Kreuzheben in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le maximum d'une répétition du soulevé de terre en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: El máximo de una repetición del levantador para el ejercicio de peso muerto en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Training Max Percentage
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of 1RM used as the training max (typically 90% for a conservative approach).

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage of 1RM used as the training max (typically 90% for a conservative approach).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Antrenman maksimumu olarak kullanılan 1TM yüzdesi (genellikle muhafazakar bir yaklaşım için %90).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Prozentsatz des 1RM, der als Trainingsmaximum verwendet wird (typischerweise 90% für einen konservativen Ansatz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le pourcentage de la 1RM utilisé comme max d'entraînement (généralement 90 % pour une approche prudente).
businessContext_i18n.es: El porcentaje del 1RM utilizado como máximo de entrenamiento (típicamente 90% para un enfoque conservador).
